results.comment_text:
@user1:
Maybe try simply removing the S.T.J package reference in `Directory.Build.props` instead? We probably don't need that global reference after updating M.E.A.I version
results.test_code:
# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_directory_build_props_removes_global_system_text_json_and_duplicate_warning_workaround__a1():
    """
    The review comment suggests removing the global System.Text.Json package reference
    (and the related duplicate-package-warning workaround) from Directory.Build.props.
    This test enforces that structural cleanup.
    """
    path = '/workspace/dotnet/Directory.Build.props'
    source = open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'NoWarnDuplicatePackages' not in source, 'Directory.Build.props should not define NoWarnDuplicatePackages; the duplicate package warning workaround should be removed.'

def test_directory_build_props_removes_global_system_text_json_and_duplicate_warning_workaround__a2():
    """
    The review comment suggests removing the global System.Text.Json package reference
    (and the related duplicate-package-warning workaround) from Directory.Build.props.
    This test enforces that structural cleanup.
    """
    path = '/workspace/dotnet/Directory.Build.props'
    source = open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'Some properties require a different version of System.Json.Text' not in source, 'Directory.Build.props should not contain the comment justifying a duplicate package warning workaround; that workaround should be removed.'

def test_directory_build_props_removes_global_system_text_json_and_duplicate_warning_workaround__a3():
    """
    The review comment suggests removing the global System.Text.Json package reference
    (and the related duplicate-package-warning workaround) from Directory.Build.props.
    This test enforces that structural cleanup.
    """
    path = '/workspace/dotnet/Directory.Build.props'
    source = open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert re.search('<PackageReference\\s+Include="System\\.Text\\.Json"\\s*/>', source) is None, 'Directory.Build.props should not contain a global <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" />; remove the global System.Text.Json reference.'
